meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup for Faster SaaS Builds
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Use this beginner-friendly Claude Code skills setup guide to ship faster, automate technical debt, and finally launch your product.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle ends by offloading boilerplate and context-switching to Claude Code. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you move from idea to MVP in days, not months. This setup forces focus on core business logic while AI handles the heavy lifting.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with 'almost-finished' projects. You have the vision, the drive, and the early momentum, but you hit the inevitable wall: the grueling, repetitive slog of wiring up databases, authentication, and API endpoints that kills your velocity and drains your creative energy.

It doesn't have to be this way. By leveraging Claude Code as your tireless pair programmer and Antigravity to structure your project blueprint, you transform from a solo coder into an engineering lead overseeing an AI-driven production line. Stop fighting the syntax and start shipping the solution.

steps.title: Define the Lean MVP Scope
steps.description: Stop building features that don't drive revenue. Use Antigravity to crystallize your core value proposition before typing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a lean MVP project structure for a [Insert SaaS Idea] focused on [Core Monetization Strategy]. Prioritize speed-to-market and strip out non-essential features.

steps.title: Initialize the Project Scaffold
steps.description: Generate your foundational file structure and environment setup to ensure your codebase is production-ready from commit one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate project structure for a modern SaaS app using [Tech Stack]. Include essential configuration files and a clear directory hierarchy.

steps.title: Implement Core Authentication
steps.description: Authentication is a commodity—don't waste hours on it. Let Claude Code handle the boilerplate integration for your chosen provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure, scalable authentication module using [Auth Provider]. Ensure it handles session management and user roles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "Implement the auth middleware following the patterns in /docs/auth.md"

steps.title: Build the Revenue Engine
steps.description: Wire up your payment gateway immediately. Validation happens when the first dollar hits your account.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for Stripe integration. Include logic for subscription tiers and webhook handling for successful payments.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "Create a Stripe service class that handles checkout sessions and webhook events"

steps.title: Automated Testing & Refinement
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your critical business logic, ensuring your MVP doesn't break as you scale.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the core business logic in the service layer. Focus on edge cases in user subscription status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "Write tests for the billing service and run them to ensure 90% coverage"

pro_tips: Always keep a 'context.md' file in your root folder; Claude Code will read this automatically to maintain architectural consistency.
Use Claude Code's 'review' feature before every commit to catch hardcoded secrets or inefficiencies you missed.
When stuck, use the 'claude ask' command to treat your codebase like a searchable document rather than just a collection of files.
Prioritize 'functional' over 'perfect' code; leverage Claude to refactor later once you have confirmed user traction.
Create a custom 'instructions.txt' for Claude Code to enforce your specific coding standards and naming conventions across every file.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment, run your first manual test, and start collecting user feedback to iterate your next feature set.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the blueprint, and the AI muscle to dominate your market. Stop dreaming and start executing. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
